task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Firefighter Certification Program' (FIRE101) course in Moodle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser should display the Moodle course page with the title 'Firefighter Certification Program' or 'FIRE101'.

task_completion.description: Set the SCORM activity name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Adding a new SCORM package' page, the 'Name' field should contain 'Fire Safety Certification - Module 1' and the 'Description' field should contain 'Mandatory fire safety training module covering basic fire prevention, evacuation procedures, and extinguisher operation.'

task_completion.description: Upload the SCORM package ZIP file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Package' file picker area should show 'fire_safety_scorm.zip' as an uploaded file.

task_completion.description: Configure the grading method and maximum grade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Grade' section of the settings, 'Grading method' should be set to 'Highest grade' and 'Maximum grade' should be set to '100'.
Under the 'Attempts management' section of the settings, 'Number of attempts' should be set to '3'.

task_completion.description: Save the SCORM package and verify it is added to the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page should display the newly created 'Fire Safety Certification - Module 1' activity, or the browser should show the specific activity's landing page after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) navigating the Moodle interface, rather than terminal commands or database clients.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual file from the file system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the system file picker dialog navigating to '/home/ga/Documents/' and selecting 'fire_safety_scorm.zip', or a drag-and-drop action from the file manager.

integrity.description: The agent did not spoof the completion by typing the requirements into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the actual Moodle web forms, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course Name: Firefighter Certification Program (FIRE101). Activity Name: 'Fire Safety Certification - Module 1'. Package File: 'fire_safety_scorm.zip' (located at /home/ga/Documents/fire_safety_scorm.zip). Grading Method: 'Highest grade'. Max Grade: 100. Max Attempts: 3.
